title: Electric Wax Melts Candle Burner 3-in-1 Scented Candle Melter Ceramic Wax Melts Warmer Electric Fragrance Essential Oil Burner Aromatherapy Home Office Bedroom Gifts - Embossed Leaves
features: Multi-functional Wax Melts Burner: The electric wax melts burner melts the wax gently and efficiently. The hot iron plate generates a decent amount of heat, makes wax melts into liquid very quickly. The scents are comfortable and aromatic, creating a calm ambience. The wax burner have 3 in 1 function, works with wax cubes/tarts, essential oil and candle jars with/without wick.

Special Design & High-Quality Material: Made of high-end polished ceramic, the special carved leaf on the wax melt warmer has smooth lines, clear texture, smooth and delicate glaze, which is highly ornamental and practical. Compact size and elegant white cream color of this electric wax warmer blends perfectly with home, offices, yoga and other occasions.

Eliminate Odors & Freshen Air: Choose your favorite essential oils, scented wax or candles to apply to this electric wax melt burners. Retouch your home style, eliminate bad smells at home, office, garage, kitchen, basement, etc. Give your room a fresh scent, indulge yourself in a relaxing aroma when you are working, meeting, reading, sleeping or exercising.

Safe and Easy to Use & Clean: Comes with UK plug, the scented wax melts burner is powered by mains, the indicator light on the base of the wax burner lets you know when it is running. No flame and smoke--safer and more sustainable. No bulb needed--free from those hassle bulb-changing processes. The removable dish allows you to say no to those tedious cleaning processes.

Innovative and Thoughtful Gift Choice: Each of the leaves on this lucky electric oil burner has a specific meaning - hope, faith, luck. This candle wax warmers can also be used to keep hot beverages such as coffee or hot cocoa at a comfortable temperature. The scented oil wax burner keeps the air smelling fresh and inviting. Choose your favorite fragrance to fill the air with a pleasant and relaxing aroma.
